milestones: A solution.py file exists containing valid Python code that defines classes or functions for user profile management including creation, editing, and storing skills/interests/past projects
Project creation and management functionality is implemented with support for title, description, required skills, and team member addition/removal
A search feature is implemented that filters users or projects by skills/interests, and a matching algorithm suggests projects or collaborators based on user preferences
Collaboration tools are implemented including a messaging system for team communication, a code repository or version control mechanism, and a task management component

Comprehensive test cases are included that validate user profile creation (valid/invalid inputs), project creation (valid/invalid inputs), search/matching functionality, and collaboration tools with multiple users
The code is syntactically valid Python that can be parsed without errors and follows a coherent structure with clearly defined components (classes/functions) for each major feature area
